texto: Culture is something you cannot buy something you cannot import something you cannot learn or produce at will. A writer an artist or musician cannot sit down and say 'Now I will produce culture.' Culture is something that evolves out of the simple enduring elements of everyday life elements most truthfully expressed in the folk arts and crafts of a nation.
explicacao: Citação de Thor Hansen sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Culture is something you cannot buy something you cannot import something you cannot learn or pro…” articula reflexao, art, artist em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e artist.
